name: Sauced Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water, onion slices, lemon, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, and the pickling spice to boiling in a Dutch oven.
2. Add frozen shrimp. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Remove from heat. Let stand for 3 minutes; drain.
4. Remove shrimp from onion-spice mixture; reserve shrimp.
5. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet.
6. Cook and stir grated onion in hot oil until tender.
7. Stir in tomatoes, white wine, parsley, bay leaf, 1 teaspoon salt, and pepper.
8. Bring mixture to a boil; reduce heat.
9. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
10. Add reserved shrimp; heat through.
11. Serve over rice.
